edges.note: Email-specific tightening of general motion guidance.
Contrast requirements are governed by the WCAG reference standard.
The correct phrasing choice depends on the audience confirmed per the scope rule.
Enforcement relies on each section declaring its background color in metadata.
Assembly-time symbol assignment uses the footnote symbols declared in section metadata.
Both are assembler-side adjacency constraints governing composition of stacked sections.
Exclusivity constraint sharpens the emphasis-color role in the chart color binding.
Coral restriction enforces the tertiary-accent position in the palette hierarchy.
Usage/orientation guidance applies only to the sanctioned approved gradient set.
Safe/forbidden pair guidance operationalizes the WCAG AA contrast minimums.
Both are baseline accessibility requirements applied together.
The skip exception narrows the asset-lock/fallback rule for rare image-stripping cases.
The signature radius persists even when the background is skipped.
Both describe the same Gradient Callout CTA section.
Geometry math implements the box/badge structure.
Radius spec applies to the same callout box and badge.
Mandatory shadow accompanies the badge.
Fallback addresses the absolute-positioning dependency of the geometry.
Cardinality limit refines the CTA button spec cluster.
Consistent side padding plus fixed 600px width jointly enable zero-gap assembly.
Usage placement relies on the correctly constructed layered wave.
Warm lifestyle photography is always presented within the accent-shape crop.
Charts/tables use uniform corners instead of the asymmetric accent shape.
Adds within-email consistency and default orientation for the accent shape.
Both govern the chart/infographic component visual system.
Together establish the data-to-footnote hierarchy in charts.
Palette restriction refines the base icon style rule.
Minimum render size applies alongside the icon style baseline.
Canonical block should respect single-focal-point and clean-layout principles.
Both govern presentation of the LISRAYA name; the trademark rule adds the ®/generic-name qualifier on first mention.
Body/secondary/footnote minimums constrain the type scale entries.
Line-height minimums apply to the body sizes defined in the scale.
Hierarchy distinction relies on the distinct sizes/weights in the type scale.
Family selection realized in email via the CSS stack.
Campaign headline is a sanctioned ALL CAPS exception to the no-all-caps rule.
Chart headline is a sanctioned ALL CAPS exception to the no-all-caps rule.
Headline title case and body sentence case together define the casing hierarchy.
Both govern emphasis; stacking limit constrains how bold combines with caps/color from the bold budget rule.
Underline/italic are additional emphasis devices subject to the two-device cap.
Heading restriction is the counterpart to the running-copy abbreviation rule.
The verbatim lockup copy is rendered using the campaign headline typographic/colorway rules.
Governs which of the three defined callout styles may coexist.
